### Life Hack Alert!
Found a trick to keep yarn untangled. Made a sleeve out of fabric and placed loop through middle of it right after unraveling. Yarn goes in one hole when ball unravels, coming out tidy. Save a lot of frustration every project! 🐼🧶💪🌈

Knitting heel is challenging, take small steps. Knit every stitch, adjust hook size gradually. Needles do magic once comfortable. Stuck? Break, let eyes rest. Fresh mind brings clarity, keeps tension in check. Hook in heals, fingers ready. Let's finish this together! 🧶👌🤗
Got through a stubborn heel row thanks to patience—just needed a breath first. Now onto the next bit of fabric, piece by piece until completed. 🧶🌟💖
